notes: Connector "in" (master side or chain-from-previous). 3.96 mm pitch, ≥5 A per pin (matches 4 A row fuse). NOT JST-XH (3 A undersized). Locked across system per OPEN_DECISIONS #4.
Connector "out" (chain-to-next or terminator end). Same MPN as J_in.

2-layer FR-4 ENIG plating; 4 traces (12V/A/B/GND) at y = 4 / 12 / 20 / 28 mm from top edge with widened pogo contact zones + isolated PG_KEY ENIG polarization pad (3x3 mm at y = 2 mm) at 8 stations per board. Width 32 mm (was 30) so trace Y-offsets exactly match unit pogo geometry.
For attaching bus PCB to 35 mm DIN rail TS35 (off-shelf or 3D-printed)
